data.title: Implement sprint-drift-check.sh script
data.description:
## Description
Create the sprint-drift-check.sh script that detects codebase drift at sprint entry by comparing git commit history since task ticket creation against the file impact table from implementation planning.

## TDD Requirement
RED tests from task 7ac3-0dcb must be written first. This task makes those tests pass (GREEN).

## Implementation
Input: epic-id as argument
1. Run ticket deps <epic-id> to get all child task IDs
2. For each child task: run ticket show <id>, extract created_at timestamp and ## File Impact section
3. Parse the file impact section to get list of files (source file column)
4. For each file in impact table: run git log --since=<created_at_epoch> --name-only --format="" -- <file> on main branch
5. Filter results: only include commits that are on main but NOT in the current branch (external commits)
6. Collect all drifted files across all tasks

Output format:
- NO_DRIFT (exit 0) if no files drifted
- DRIFT_DETECTED: <comma-separated file list> (exit 0) if drift found
- Exit 1 on missing arguments, exit 2 on usage error

Handle edge cases:
- Task with no ## File Impact section → skip that task (no drift reportable)
- Epic with no children → NO_DRIFT
- Git log errors → graceful degradation, skip that file

## Files to Create
- plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-drift-check.sh

## Files to Modify
- .test-index (remove RED markers once tests pass)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-drift-check.sh
- [ ] Script handles missing arguments gracefully (non-zero exit)
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-drift-check.sh 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] All RED tests from 7ac3-0dcb now pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh
- [ ] RED markers removed from .test-index for this source file
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[.*sprint.*drift.*\]' .test-index || true
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
